name: 系統綁定懸念
description: 穿越後立即綁定育兒系統，任務失敗即死亡的設定製造持續懸念，觀眾想知道女主如何在資源匱乏的冷宮完成任務。系統積分和商店機制也帶來遊戲化的爽感期待。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated Unfavored Concubine,Unexpectedly Use Modern Knowledge Raise Baby,Emperor Shock!
examples.excerpt: All you need to do is complete the main mission of raising the child in the cold palace, and you can continue to live in this world. But what if I can't complete the mission? You will die on the spot.
